entries.title: Karpathy's AutoResearch: The Autonomous ML Research Loop
entries.summary: Open-source tool runs 100+ autonomous ML experiments overnight on a single GPU, compressing years of human research into hours.

entries.title: Microsoft Frontier Transformation: Copilot Goes Agentic
entries.summary: Wave 3: Copilot Cowork (built with Anthropic) for multi-step work. Claude in mainline Copilot. Agent 365 control plane ($15/user) — 500K agents internally. E7 Frontier Suite ($99/user). 90% Fortune 500 on Copilot. Federal: US Dept of Interior, NASA.

entries.title: Anthropic Code Review: Multi-Agent Bug Detection for Claude Code
entries.summary: Multi-agent system catches logic bugs in PRs before human review. Internal testing tripled meaningful feedback.

entries.title: Nvidia NemoClaw: Open-Source AI Agent Platform for Enterprise
entries.summary: Chip-agnostic open-source agent platform with built-in security. Pitching Salesforce, Cisco, Google, Adobe, CrowdStrike.

entries.title: AI for Boring Businesses: Four Lessons from Main Street
entries.summary: Former Stripe leader argues the real AI opportunity is in operationally complex service businesses. Research compressed 3mo→3wk, reward outcomes not AI usage, humans remain stubbornly hard to replace.

entries.title: Analogue Intelligence: What AI Can't Replicate — and Why It Matters
entries.summary: Harvard professor argues the real anxiety of AI isn't job replacement — it's losing the conditions under which human judgment, taste, and craft are developed. The premium on irreducibly human expertise increases as AI handles the mechanical.

entries.title: SBIR/STTR Programs Revived — Five-Year Reauthorization with Teeth
entries.summary: Senate passes 5-year reauthorization after 5-month lapse. New $30M Strategic Breakthrough Phase II awards, expanded foreign-ownership scrutiny, agency-set proposal caps. House vote pending.

entries.title: Deloitte CXO Playbook: The Leadership Gap in Agentic AI
entries.summary: Role-by-role guide for C-suite AI adoption. The barrier is leadership, not technology: enterprises are technically ready for agents but stuck in experiments. CEO, COO, CIO, CHRO, CFO, CRO each own distinct decisions.

entries.title: McKinsey: Sovereign AI — From Ambition to Ecosystem
entries.summary: Sovereign AI projected at $100B investment in 2026. Four-actor ecosystem required: governments, providers, enterprises, investors. Most enterprises have roadmaps but lack strategy, budgets, or workload tiering.

entries.title: Deloitte 2026 Human Capital Trends: The Adaptability Crisis
entries.summary: 85% of leaders say adaptability is critical, only 7% are leading it. 65% say culture must change for AI. Only 6% making progress on human-AI work design. Introduces 'culture debt' as the cost of neglecting workforce transformation.

entries.title: Google Bayesian Teaching: AI That Learns to Update Its Own Beliefs
entries.summary: Google Research teaches LLMs to reason like Bayesian statisticians — maintaining uncertainty and updating beliefs with new evidence. 80% agreement with optimal Bayesian predictions. Zero-shot transfer to unseen domains. Paradigm shift from static pattern-matching to adaptive reasoning.

entries.title: Ron Shaich: Long-Term Greedy, Not Short-Term Stupid
entries.summary: Panera founder built $7.8B company on empathy-driven transformation. Key maxims: complexity kills more than competition, innovation dies when efficiency takes over, profit is the result not the goal, you can't scale what you don't understand.
